dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Technical ribbon shows CHOP (15c spread, fast/slow nearly identical at 694.63/694.61, mixed bar structure) and level_thesis finds price sandwiched between 693.0 support and 695.86 resistance in a consolidation zone — both higher-weighted chart agents refuse to validate the bullish overnight sector-rotation narrative until price action confirms directional resolution at the open.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: The bullish agents rely entirely on overnight sector strength (XLK +1.96%) without acknowledging that the flat $0.17 overnight gap is a rejection of that strength — if overnight traders had conviction, SPY would have gapped up materially, not +$0.17.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY opens and holds above 695.0 on the first 09:30–09:40 bar with volume > 95K and ribbon orders bullish (fast > slow EMA), pushing 696.0+ by 09:50 ET — this resolves the technical chop bullish and initiates the battle-level test at 696.95.

primary.condition: if SPY breaks above 696.95 (Carry ★★ 5-day high) on strong volume with ribbon ordered bullish

secondary.condition: if SPY rallies into 695.86 (Active ★★ prior-day high) but fails to close above it on first attempt

invalidation.condition: SPY opens above 695.0 on the 09:30–09:40 bar with volume > 95K AND ribbon orders bullish (fast > slow EMA) with spread > 30c AND price extends to 696.0+ by 09:50 ET
invalidation.effect: Technical chop resolves bullish; battle-level test at 696.95 begins in earnest; bearish/no_trade counter-argument fully invalidated; upgrade consensus strength from weak to moderate.

swarm_predictions.claim: 695.86 (Active ★★ prior-day high resistance) is tested within the first 60 minutes of RTH but SPY fails to close a 5m bar above it on first attempt by 10:30 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5m bar above 695.86 with volume > 95K at any point before 10:30 ET

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains in the 16.5–18.0 range throughout all of RTH on 2026-02-10 with no regime change from MID — zero macro events prevent any spike above 18.5
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX spikes above 18.5 or drops below 16.0 at any point during RTH (09:30–16:00 ET)

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY 5m ribbon spread (fast minus slow EMA) stays below 30c through the first 30 minutes of RTH (through 10:00 ET), preventing any qualifying directional entry signal before 10:00 ET
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon spread exceeds 30c with a fully ordered bullish or bearish stack (fast > pivot > slow OR fast < pivot < slow) by 09:50 ET close

synthesis_narrative: The core tension on 2026-02-10 is between genuine overnight risk-on sector rotation (XLK +1.96%, XLE +0.81%) and the flat $0.17 overnight gap that negates any market conviction behind those moves — if overnight traders truly believed in the tech rally, SPY would have opened materially higher. Macro and internals cast bullish votes, but the two highest-chart-signal agents (technical at 0.35 weight and level_thesis at 0.25 weight) both vote no_trade, producing only a weak 0.40 weighted bullish score; validator further flags narrow breadth (XLF -0.26% diverging) and yesterday's bearish close as trapped-longs conditions that favor a first-hour flush toward 693.0 before any sustained rally. The single most important thing to watch at market open: whether SPY holds and closes above 695.0 on the first 09:30–09:40 bar with volume > 95K — that is the gateway to the bullish scenario and the only clean invalidation of the no_trade / bearish dissent.

technical.one_line: CHOP ribbon (fast 694.63, slow 694.61, spread 15c) + alternating bar structure (2 red, 2 green, no sustained trend) — zero directional conviction.

macro.one_line: VIX 17.35 MID regime stable, zero events today, risk-on sector backdrop — modest bullish lean contingent on ribbon clarifying by 09:35 ET.

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 696.95 (Carry ★★) is 2.78 away with MIXED ribbon; price sandwiched between 695.86 resistance and 693.0 support — consolidation awaiting open-bar resolution.

internals.one_line: XLK +1.96% tech leadership (130bps outperformance vs SPY) signals risk-on rotation — NARROW breadth (XLF -0.26%) limits conviction but net bullish.

validator.top_invalidation: Flat $0.17 overnight gap rejects bullish overnight sector strength; XLF -0.26% + yesterday's 150bp bearish selloff + technical chop = trapped longs flush more likely than immediate rally toward 696.95.
